## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is progressing with 12 editorial articles and 25 glossary pages published/ready this week](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Need to improve website structure for glossary pages to ensure proper indexing](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Considering shifting focus to link building efforts to boost authority, especially before the upcoming rebrand](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Custom image template to be created by Pixis design team for more efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [12 editorial articles (2 published last week, 10 ready this week) and 25 glossary pages (500 words each) produced](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Aiming for longer articles (3000+ words) using advanced research and competitor analysis techniques](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Considering pivot to link building efforts after completing initial glossary pages (100-218 terms identified)](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Potential to explore programmatic content generation for detailed marketing guides in the future](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [Current AI glossary page structure not ideal for SEO (modal instead of indexed pages)](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Need to create a new page type for glossary entries to ensure proper indexing](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Evan to investigate WordPress permissions and connect with internal teams for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Image Generation for Content

  - [Midjourney proving time-consuming for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Temporary solution: simple Canva designs using new brand colors](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Jason to have design team create a customizable template based on Aida's specifications](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

### SEO and Authority Building

  - [Pixis has significant LinkedIn following (130K+) due to Indian developer community](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Potential to leverage this audience for traffic and authority building in the future](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Considering shift to link building efforts to boost authority, especially important before upcoming rebrand (expected 30% authority loss)](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Programmatic vs. Editorial Content

  - [Current focus on editorial content and glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Exploring options for future programmatic content after glossary completion](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Potential shift to link building efforts instead of programmatic content in the short term](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to send image template specifications to Jason for design team](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Jason to discuss potential shift to link building with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Evan to investigate WordPress permissions and glossary page structure improvements](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Team to continue producing glossary pages, focusing on approved terms](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Aida to publish 10 new articles this week once images are ready](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Consider adding "paid social" and "paid search" as separate glossary terms](https://fathom.video/share/o2obKsW9-avr8xVvRedDEbRPNLoJxcUB?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
